_description: Provenance scoring and representative selection fixture. Shows three items covering the same event (evt-prov-demo) with different tiers, demonstrating T1 boost, T4 conditional decay, and representative selection.

items.title: OpenAI Announces GPT-5
items._note: T1 direct source. Highest tier in event -> wins representative selection despite lower final_score than T4 item.

items.title: TechCrunch: OpenAI Launches GPT-5
items._note: T2 original reporting. Same event as T1 item -> not representative (T1 wins by tier rank).

items.title: 36Kr: OpenAI GPT-5 Released
items._note_decay: T4 aggregation WITH T1 sibling in same event -> 0.75 decay applied. Despite highest final_score (0.80), adjusted_score (0.60) is lowest.

items.title: 36Kr: China Tech Regulation Update
items._note_no_decay: T4 aggregation but NO T1/T2 sibling in event evt-prov-solo -> no penalty applied. Aggregation is the only coverage for this event.

events.title: OpenAI GPT-5 Launch
events._selection_reason: T1 (rank 1) beats T2 (rank 2) and T4 (rank 4). Only news-prov-t1 enters the digest pool.

events.title: China Tech Regulation Update
events._selection_reason: Single item in event -> implicit representative. No T4 decay because no higher-tier sibling.
